scene: A cartoon shopper just inside a grocery store entrance, looking around with a small thought bubble of a single milk carton above their head. Flat warm cream background with simple shelf shapes. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A simple top-down floor plan of a store: a door at the bottom and a lone milk carton in the far top corner, with a long dotted path snaking all the way across the whole store between them. Flat cream background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A cartoon shopper walking down a long aisle between tall colorful shelves, one hand grabbing an extra item off a shelf into a basket, a couple of impulse items already in the basket. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A cartoon shopper at a checkout with a cart overflowing with groceries, a single small milk carton balanced on top, the shopper raising an eyebrow at the giant pile. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
